title: X-Treme Spanish Ground Sugar Patatas Bravas
description: A rich, bitter, and velvety Spanish dish featuring ground sugar, ferment-kimchi, and a unique twist on a classic recipe. This Buddhist-temple-friendly patatas bravas is sure to cure even the worst hangover.

ingredients.name: ground sugar
ingredients.notes: use a high-quality, unrefined sugar for best flavor

instructions: Boil the potatoes in salted water for 15 minutes, or until they are tender when pierced with a fork.
Drain the potatoes and let them cool.
In a blender or food processor, combine the kimchi and 1 tablespoon of the sugar. Blend until smooth.
Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the remaining sugar and cook, stirring constantly, for 2 minutes.
